name: Brown Sugar Icebox Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat the butter with an electric mixer until fluffy.
2. Add the brown sugar and granulated sugar; beat until well blended.
3. Beat in the egg and vanilla extract until thickened.
4. Beat in 2/3 cup of the flour along with the baking soda and salt.
5. Stir in the remaining 1 cup of flour; the dough will be soft.
6. Divide the dough into two equal parts.
7. Wrap each part separately in wax or parchment paper or plastic wrap.
8. Shape each wrapped portion into a 6-inch log.
9. Refrigerate the logs until firm (up to 1 week refrigerated or up to 2 months frozen).
10. Preheat oven to 350°F.
11. Using a thin knife, slice each log into pieces measuring 1/8 to 1/4 inch thick.
12. Arrange the cookies about 1 inch apart on a buttered baking sheet.
13. Bake for 10 to 15 minutes or until lightly golden.
